changes.value:
## What

Implement `TrackedStore<Item = Entity, ItemId = EntityId>` for the entity system. Replace entity's own changelog, undo stack, and flush logic with the store crate. Wire `StoreContext` into the dispatch layer. **Stop here and manually test do/undo/redo before proceeding.**

**Files to modify:**
- `swissarmyhammer-entity/Cargo.toml` â€” add dep on `swissarmyhammer-store`
- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/lib.rs` â€” add `EntityId(Ulid)` newtype, export it
- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/context.rs` â€” implement `TrackedStore`:
  - `type Item = Entity`
  - `type ItemId = EntityId`
  - `root()` â†’ entity_types directory
  - `item_id(entity)` â†’ `EntityId` from entity
  - `serialize(entity)` â†’ MD+YAML frontmatter text
  - `deserialize(text)` â†’ parse frontmatter+body into Entity
- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/undo_commands.rs` â€” `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` dispatch through `StoreContext` instead of `EntityContext::undo()`

**Files to delete:**
- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/undo_stack.rs` â€” moved to store crate
- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/changelog.rs` â€” replaced by store crate

**Files to modify in kanban-app:**
- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` â€” replace `flush_and_emit_for_handle` with `store_context.flush_all()` + generic event emission loop
- `kanban-app/src/state.rs` â€” `AppState` holds `StoreContext`, registers entity `StoreHandle` on board open

**Approach:**

### EntityId newtype
```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash)]
pub struct EntityId(ulid::Ulid);
// Display, FromStr â€” delegate to Ulid
```

### TrackedStore impl
The serialize/deserialize methods must match the existing on-disk format exactly so existing boards load without migration:
- `serialize`: YAML frontmatter between `---` delimiters + markdown body (if body_field is set)
- `deserialize`: parse `---` delimiters, YAML frontmatter, markdown body

### Migration path for EntityContext
- `EntityContext` keeps its in-memory entity registry, field definitions, schema
- Write path: `EntityContext::write()` delegates to `StoreHandle::write()` instead of doing its own file I/O + changelog
- Delete path: `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to `StoreHandle::delete()`
- Undo/redo: removed from EntityContext, handled by StoreContext
- `push_undo_stack()`: removed, StoreHandle returns UndoEntryId, caller pushes to StoreContext

### Dispatch layer changes
- `dispatch_command_internal` gets access to `StoreContext` (on AppState)
- After undoable commands: `store_context.flush_all()` replaces `flush_and_emit_for_handle()`
- Emit each `ChangeEvent` from flush
- `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` call `store_context.undo()`/`redo()`
- UIState undo/redo flags synced from `store_context.can_undo()`/`can_redo()`

### Manual test checklist (do this before moving on)
1. Open existing board â€” all entities load correctly
2. Create a task â€” file appears on disk, changelog.jsonl entry logged
3. Edit a task field â€” changelog entry with before/after text
4. Cmd+Z â€” edit is undone, file reverts
5. Cmd+Shift+Z â€” edit is redone
6. Delete a task â€” Cmd+Z restores it
7. External file edit (e.g. vim) â€” flush detects change, UI updates
8. Multiple undo/redo in sequence
9. All existing tests pass

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `EntityId(Ulid)` newtype exported from entity crate
- [ ] `TrackedStore<Item=Entity, ItemId=EntityId>` implemented
- [ ] Entity serialize/deserialize matches existing on-disk format (no migration needed)
- [ ] `EntityContext::write()` delegates to `StoreHandle::write()`
- [ ] `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to `StoreHandle::delete()`
- [ ] Entity `changelog.rs` and `undo_stack.rs` deleted
- [ ] `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` dispatch through `StoreContext`
- [ ] `dispatch_command_internal` uses `store_context.flush_all()`
- [ ] Existing boards load without migration
- [ ] Do/undo/redo works end-to-end (manually verified)
- [ ] All existing tests green

## Tests
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -E 'rdeps(swissarmyhammer-entity)'` â€” all existing entity tests pass
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -E 'rdeps(swissarmyhammer-kanban)'` â€” all kanban tests pass (undo/redo integration)
- [ ] `cargo nextest run --workspace` â€” no regressions anywhere
- [ ] Manual: create task â†’ undo â†’ redo â†’ verify
- [ ] Manual: edit field â†’ undo â†’ redo â†’ verify
- [ ] Manual: delete task â†’ undo â†’ verify restored
- [ ] Manual: external file edit â†’ UI updates
Migrate entity to TrackedStore â€” do/undo/redo, all tests green

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,74 +1,92 @@
 ## What

-Implement `TrackedStore<Item = Entity, ItemId = EntityId>` for the entity system. Replace entity's own changelog, undo stack, and flush logic with the store crate. Wire `StoreContext` into the dispatch layer. **Stop here and manually test do/undo/redo before proceeding.**
+Implement `TrackedStore` for each entity type (task, column, swimlane, tag, actor, board). One store per entity type directory. Replace entity's own changelog, undo stack, and flush logic with the store crate. Wire `StoreContext` into the dispatch layer. **Stop here and manually test do/undo/redo before proceeding.**
+
+**Key design:** One store per entity type, not one store for all entities. Each entity type has its own directory, serialization format (MD+YAML vs plain YAML), and ID format (ULID vs slug).

 **Files to modify:**
 - `swissarmyhammer-entity/Cargo.toml` â€” add dep on `swissarmyhammer-store`
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/lib.rs` â€” add `EntityId(Ulid)` newtype, export it
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/context.rs` â€” implement `TrackedStore`:
-  - `type Item = Entity`
-  - `type ItemId = EntityId`
-  - `root()` â†’ entity_types directory
-  - `item_id(entity)` â†’ `EntityId` from entity
-  - `serialize(entity)` â†’ MD+YAML frontmatter text
-  - `deserialize(text)` â†’ parse frontmatter+body into Entity
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/undo_commands.rs` â€” `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` dispatch through `StoreContext` instead of `EntityContext::undo()`
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/lib.rs` â€” add `EntityId(String)` newtype, export it
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/stores.rs` â€” (new) `TrackedStore` impls for each entity type, driven by `EntityDef`

-**Files to delete:**
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/undo_stack.rs` â€” moved to store crate
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/changelog.rs` â€” replaced by store crate
+**Per entity type, a TrackedStore impl that knows:**
+- `root()` â†’ `.kanban/{type}s/` (e.g. `.kanban/tasks/`, `.kanban/columns/`)
+- `item_id()` â†’ `EntityId(String)` â€” ULID for tasks, slug for columns/tags/actors
+- `serialize()` â†’ MD+YAML if `EntityDef.body_field` is Some, plain YAML otherwise. Strips computed fields, applies defaults, deterministic field ordering for clean diffs.
+- `deserialize()` â†’ parse frontmatter+body or plain YAML, inject ID from filename, flatten nested objects one level

-**Files to modify in kanban-app:**
-- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` â€” replace `flush_and_emit_for_handle` with `store_context.flush_all()` + generic event emission loop
-- `kanban-app/src/state.rs` â€” `AppState` holds `StoreContext`, registers entity `StoreHandle` on board open
+**EntityId newtype:**
+```rust
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash)]
+pub struct EntityId(String);  // NOT Copy â€” slugs are strings
+// Display, FromStr â€” trivial delegation
+```

 **Approach:**

-### EntityId newtype
+### Store construction from EntityDef
+Rather than separate structs per type, one generic `EntityTypeStore` parameterized by `EntityDef`:
 ```rust
-#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash)]
-pub struct EntityId(ulid::Ulid);
-// Display, FromStr â€” delegate to Ulid
+pub struct EntityTypeStore {
+    root: PathBuf,
+    entity_def: Arc<EntityDef>,
+    field_defs: Arc<Vec<FieldDef>>,  // needed for computed field stripping + defaults
+}
+
+impl TrackedStore for EntityTypeStore {
+    type Item = Entity;
+    type ItemId = EntityId;
+    // serialize/deserialize dispatch on entity_def.body_field
+}
 ```

-### TrackedStore impl
-The serialize/deserialize methods must match the existing on-disk format exactly so existing boards load without migration:
-- `serialize`: YAML frontmatter between `---` delimiters + markdown body (if body_field is set)
-- `deserialize`: parse `---` delimiters, YAML frontmatter, markdown body
+This means one struct, constructed per entity type with different `EntityDef`s. Register one `StoreHandle<EntityTypeStore>` per entity type in `StoreContext`.

-### Migration path for EntityContext
-- `EntityContext` keeps its in-memory entity registry, field definitions, schema
-- Write path: `EntityContext::write()` delegates to `StoreHandle::write()` instead of doing its own file I/O + changelog
-- Delete path: `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to `StoreHandle::delete()`
-- Undo/redo: removed from EntityContext, handled by StoreContext
-- `push_undo_stack()`: removed, StoreHandle returns UndoEntryId, caller pushes to StoreContext
+### Migration path
+- `EntityContext::write()` delegates to the appropriate `StoreHandle` (looked up by entity type)
+- `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to `StoreHandle::delete()`
+- `EntityContext` keeps: in-memory entity registry, schema, validation engine, computed field derivation
+- Validation happens in `EntityContext` before calling `store.write()` â€” validation is above the store
+- Computed field stripping happens in `EntityTypeStore::serialize()` â€” it has access to `FieldDef`s to know which fields are computed
+- `push_undo_stack()` removed â€” `StoreHandle::write()` returns `UndoEntryId`, command layer pushes to `StoreContext`

 ### Dispatch layer changes
-- `dispatch_command_internal` gets access to `StoreContext` (on AppState)
+- `AppState` holds `StoreContext`
+- On board open: register one `StoreHandle<EntityTypeStore>` per entity type
 - After undoable commands: `store_context.flush_all()` replaces `flush_and_emit_for_handle()`
-- Emit each `ChangeEvent` from flush
 - `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` call `store_context.undo()`/`redo()`
-- UIState undo/redo flags synced from `store_context.can_undo()`/`can_redo()`

+### Changelog migration
+- Existing per-entity `.jsonl` changelogs are NOT migrated â€” they stay for backward compatibility / activity history
+- New store-level `changelog.jsonl` (one per entity type directory) is the undo source of truth going forward
+- Old undo_stack.yaml entries from before the migration won't match new UndoEntryIds â€” the stack starts fresh on first run after migration (acceptable â€” better than a complex migration)
+
+### Files to delete
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/undo_stack.rs` â€” moved to store crate
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/changelog.rs` â€” replaced by store crate (may keep for activity feed, but undo no longer uses it)
+
 ### Manual test checklist (do this before moving on)
-1. Open existing board â€” all entities load correctly
-2. Create a task â€” file appears on disk, changelog.jsonl entry logged
-3. Edit a task field â€” changelog entry with before/after text
-4. Cmd+Z â€” edit is undone, file reverts
+1. Open existing board â€” all entities load correctly (no format changes)
+2. Create a task â€” file on disk, new changelog.jsonl entry with before/after text
+3. Edit a task field â€” changelog entry with text diff
+4. Cmd+Z â€” edit is undone, file reverts to previous text
 5. Cmd+Shift+Z â€” edit is redone
-6. Delete a task â€” Cmd+Z restores it
-7. External file edit (e.g. vim) â€” flush detects change, UI updates
-8. Multiple undo/redo in sequence
-9. All existing tests pass
+6. Delete a task â†’ Cmd+Z restores it from trash
+7. Edit a column name â†’ Cmd+Z reverts (plain YAML entity)
+8. External file edit â†’ flush detects change, UI updates
+9. Transaction: command that writes multiple entities â†’ single Cmd+Z undoes all
+10. All existing tests pass

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `EntityId(Ulid)` newtype exported from entity crate
-- [ ] `TrackedStore<Item=Entity, ItemId=EntityId>` implemented
-- [ ] Entity serialize/deserialize matches existing on-disk format (no migration needed)
-- [ ] `EntityContext::write()` delegates to `StoreHandle::write()`
-- [ ] `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to `StoreHandle::delete()`
-- [ ] Entity `changelog.rs` and `undo_stack.rs` deleted
-- [ ] `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` dispatch through `StoreContext`
+- [ ] `EntityId(String)` newtype exported from entity crate
+- [ ] `EntityTypeStore` implements `TrackedStore<Item=Entity, ItemId=EntityId>`
+- [ ] One `StoreHandle<EntityTypeStore>` registered per entity type
+- [ ] Serialize matches existing on-disk format (MD+YAML / plain YAML)
+- [ ] Computed fields stripped in serialize
+- [ ] Deserialize handles both formats, injects ID from filename
+- [ ] `EntityContext::write()` delegates to StoreHandle
+- [ ] `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to StoreHandle
+- [ ] `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` dispatch through StoreContext
 - [ ] `dispatch_command_internal` uses `store_context.flush_all()`
 - [ ] Existing boards load without migration
 - [ ] Do/undo/redo works end-to-end (manually verified)
@@ -76,9 +94,6 @@

 ## Tests
 - [ ] `cargo nextest run -E 'rdeps(swissarmyhammer-entity)'` â€” all existing entity tests pass
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -E 'rdeps(swissarmyhammer-kanban)'` â€” all kanban tests pass (undo/redo integration)
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run --workspace` â€” no regressions anywhere
-- [ ] Manual: create task â†’ undo â†’ redo â†’ verify
-- [ ] Manual: edit field â†’ undo â†’ redo â†’ verify
-- [ ] Manual: delete task â†’ undo â†’ verify restored
-- [ ] Manual: external file edit â†’ UI updates
\ No newline at end of file
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -E 'rdeps(swissarmyhammer-kanban)'` â€” all kanban tests pass
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run --workspace` â€” no regressions
+- [ ] Manual: full checklist above
\ No newline at end of file
